goal: Land the config-gated Qwen3-Embedding 8B GPU upgrade path: NEW `Qwen3Embedding` bundle + `Qwen3EmbeddingError` thiserror enum (≥6 variants) + Matryoshka-dimension validation [32, 7168] + GPU-EP detection (returns `NoGpuDetected` when no `ort` GPU feature is compiled, which is the current `default-features=false` workspace state) + NEW `VectorStoreConfig` TOML parser for the `[vector_store]` section per master-plan §17.6 lines 2026-2030, all wired through the FROZEN acceptance test `test_qwen3_config_gate` at module root of `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` (DEC-0007). Per master-plan §4.2 line 303 (`Qwen3-Embedding-8B (Apache 2.0, 80.68 MTEB-Code, 32K context, Matryoshka dimension support 32–7168). Substantially better retrieval quality but requires GPU for reasonable throughput.`) and §18 Phase 2 Week 8 line 1787 (`CodeRankEmbed (137M, CPU) as default, Qwen3-Embedding (8B, GPU optional) as upgrade`).
plan_summary: Add NEW file `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/config.rs` (~120 LOC) hosting `pub struct VectorStoreConfig` + `pub enum EmbeddingBackend { CodeRankEmbed, Qwen3 }` + `pub enum ConfigError` thiserror (≥4 variants) + `from_toml_str` parser + 5-7 negative-path unit tests in a `#[cfg(test)] mod config_tests {}` block at file end. Add NEW types/helpers to `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` (~250-350 LOC additions): `pub struct Qwen3Embedding`, `pub enum Qwen3EmbeddingError` (≥6 variants), `pub fn validate_matryoshka_dimension`, `pub fn detect_gpu_execution_provider`, `pub enum GpuKind { Cuda, TensorRt, DirectMl, None }`, `pub const MIN_MATRYOSHKA_DIM: usize = 32`, `pub const MAX_MATRYOSHKA_DIM: usize = 7168`, the FROZEN acceptance test `pub fn test_qwen3_config_gate()` at MODULE ROOT (DEC-0007) with 12 sub-assertions, and a `#[cfg(test)] mod qwen3_tests {}` block at file end with 5-7 negative-path unit tests for variant coverage of `Qwen3EmbeddingError`. Add `pub mod config;` declaration + per-symbol `pub use` re-exports to `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/lib.rs` (cumulative re-export streak now 15 consecutive WOs). Add `serde.workspace = true` + `toml.workspace = true` to `crates/ucil-embeddings/Cargo.toml [dependencies]` (alphabetical insertion). Add NEW `scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh` frozen wrapper. The implementation runs entirely on CPU — no real Qwen3 model file (the 8B model would be ~16-32 GB and is operator-installed at a future F04/F08 consumer site), no new ort GPU EP features (cuda/tensorrt/directml stay off), no daemon/cli plumbing of the new config (deferred to F04 LanceDB indexer and beyond per scope_out).
scope_in: Create NEW file `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/config.rs` (~100-150 LOC) with module-level rustdoc citing master-plan §17.6 lines 2026-2030 (the `[vector_store]` block — `backend = "lancedb"`, `embedding_model = "coderankembed"`, `embedding_dimensions = 768`, `chunk_max_tokens = 512`, `reindex_on_startup = false`) and §4.2 line 303 (embedding model strategy). The module declares: (a) `pub enum EmbeddingBackend { CodeRankEmbed, Qwen3 }` with `#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, serde::Deserialize)]` + `#[serde(rename_all = "kebab-case")]` so the master-plan-frozen literal `"qwen3-embedding"` parses to `EmbeddingBackend::Qwen3` and `"coderankembed"` parses to `EmbeddingBackend::CodeRankEmbed`. Provide `pub fn from_config_str(s: &str) -> Result<Self, ConfigError>` mapping the two literal strings explicitly AND returning `Err(ConfigError::UnknownEmbeddingModel { name: s.to_owned() })` on any other input. (b) `pub struct VectorStoreConfig { pub backend: String, pub embedding_model: String, pub embedding_dimensions: usize, pub chunk_max_tokens: usize, pub reindex_on_startup: bool }` with `#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Deserialize)]` + per-field `#[serde(default = "<helper_fn>")]` defaulting the entire struct to the master-plan defaults. Each default helper is a tiny `fn` returning the literal master-plan value (`fn default_backend() -> String { "lancedb".to_owned() }`, `fn default_embedding_model() -> String { "coderankembed".to_owned() }`, `fn default_embedding_dimensions() -> usize { 768 }`, `fn default_chunk_max_tokens() -> usize { 512 }`, `fn default_reindex_on_startup() -> bool { false }`). Implement `Default` for `VectorStoreConfig` returning the same all-defaults shape via the helper functions so `VectorStoreConfig::default()` is a publicly-callable shortcut. (c) `pub fn from_toml_str(toml_str: &str) -> Result<VectorStoreConfig, ConfigError>` — wrap an inner private `#[derive(serde::Deserialize)] struct VectorStoreConfigDoc { #[serde(default)] vector_store: VectorStoreConfig }` and call `toml::from_str::<VectorStoreConfigDoc>(toml_str)?`; map any `toml::de::Error` to `ConfigError::Toml { source }` via `#[from]`. On absent `[vector_store]` table (empty TOML or missing section), the `#[serde(default)]` returns the all-defaults `VectorStoreConfig` (per the master-plan-frozen `"coderankembed default"` semantics — empty config means CodeRankEmbed, NOT an error). (d) `pub enum ConfigError` thiserror with `#[non_exhaustive]` and ≥4 variants: `Toml { #[from] source: toml::de::Error }` (parse), `UnknownEmbeddingModel { name: String }` (string-validation), `UnknownBackend { name: String }` (string-validation), `Validation { reason: String }` (aggregate-validation, e.g. dimensions out of range when paired with a model that doesn't support it). Each variant's `#[error("...")]` Display string is operator-readable per WO-0058/0059/0060 lessons.

Add `pub mod config;` declaration to `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/lib.rs` (alphabetically just BEFORE `pub mod models;` — verify the current `pub mod chunker; pub mod models; pub mod onnx_inference;` ordering at lib.rs:38-40 and insert `pub mod config;` between `pub mod chunker;` and `pub mod models;` so alpha order is preserved). Add `pub use config::{ConfigError, EmbeddingBackend, VectorStoreConfig};` to the re-export block (alphabetically between the existing `pub use chunker::...` and `pub use models::...` lines at lib.rs:41-42, preserving the current alphabetical ordering). Extend the module-level `//!` rustdoc at the head of `lib.rs` to cite the new public surface for `P2-W8-F03` and reference master-plan §4.2 line 303 + §17.6 lines 2026-2030 + §18 Phase 2 Week 8 line 1787. Cumulative re-export discipline: this WO continues the 14-WO streak (WO-0042 → WO-0058 → WO-0059 → WO-0060 → WO-0061), pushing the streak to 15 consecutive WOs. AC14 verifies via `grep -nE 'pub use config::|pub use models::Qwen3' crates/ucil-embeddings/src/lib.rs` returns ≥2 hits.

Add `serde.workspace = true` and `toml.workspace = true` to `crates/ucil-embeddings/Cargo.toml [dependencies]`. The workspace `Cargo.toml` already pins `serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }` (line 34) and `toml = "0.8"` (line 59) — workspace-pin verified, so the per-crate addition is just `serde.workspace = true` and `toml.workspace = true`. Alphabetical insertion: after `ort.workspace = true` insert `serde.workspace = true`; after `tokenizers.workspace = true` insert `toml.workspace = true` (so the order becomes `ndarray, ort, serde, thiserror, tokenizers, toml, tokio, tracing, ucil-core, ucil-treesitter`). The `Cargo.lock` should NOT churn since `serde` and `toml` are already in the workspace dep graph (every other ucil-* crate uses them). AC16 verifies the per-crate dep declarations.

Add NEW `pub struct Qwen3Embedding` (~50-80 LOC) at MODULE ROOT of `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` (NOT inside `mod tests {}` or `mod qwen3_tests {}`). The struct mirrors the `CodeRankEmbed` template but does NOT actually load the 8B Qwen3 model (no real Qwen3 model file is committed — see scope_out[1]). Fields: `model_dir: PathBuf`, `dimensions: usize`. Methods: (a) `pub fn load(model_dir: &Path, dimensions: usize) -> Result<Self, Qwen3EmbeddingError>` — the production loader. Implementation order: (i) call `validate_matryoshka_dimension(dimensions)?` to validate the requested Matryoshka dimension is in [32, 7168]; (ii) call `detect_gpu_execution_provider()?` to check that at least one GPU EP is available — on the current workspace this returns `Err(Qwen3EmbeddingError::NoGpuDetected { ... })` because the workspace `ort` is configured `default-features = false` with no `cuda`/`tensorrt`/`directml` features compiled in (per Cargo.toml line 191-194 comment); (iii) only if both checks pass, return `Ok(Self { model_dir: model_dir.to_owned(), dimensions })`. The current workspace state means `Qwen3Embedding::load(...)` will ALWAYS return `Err(NoGpuDetected)` — that is the EXPECTED behaviour and is what the frozen test `test_qwen3_config_gate` asserts on. (b) `pub fn dimensions(&self) -> usize` — accessor returning the validated Matryoshka dim. (c) `pub fn model_dir(&self) -> &Path` — accessor returning the configured model directory. (d) Tracing: every method instrumented with `#[tracing::instrument(name = "ucil.embeddings.qwen3.<op>", level = "debug", ...)]` per master-plan §15.2 line 1571 span-naming convention.

Add NEW `pub fn validate_matryoshka_dimension(d: usize) -> Result<usize, Qwen3EmbeddingError>` at MODULE ROOT of `models.rs`. Pure function (no IO, no `&self`), testable in isolation per WO-0059 lessons line 600 (`extract pub(crate) helpers for in-test invocation`). Body: returns `Ok(d)` if `MIN_MATRYOSHKA_DIM <= d && d <= MAX_MATRYOSHKA_DIM` (inclusive on both ends per master-plan §4.2 line 303 `Matryoshka dimension support 32–7168`); otherwise returns `Err(Qwen3EmbeddingError::DimensionOutOfRange { value: d, min: MIN_MATRYOSHKA_DIM, max: MAX_MATRYOSHKA_DIM })`. Cite the master-plan-frozen bounds in the rustdoc.

Add NEW `pub const MIN_MATRYOSHKA_DIM: usize = 32;` and `pub const MAX_MATRYOSHKA_DIM: usize = 7168;` constants at MODULE ROOT of `models.rs` (sibling to `EMBEDDING_DIM` at models.rs:88). Both values are master-plan-frozen per §4.2 line 303 (`Matryoshka dimension support 32–7168`). The bounds are INCLUSIVE on both ends per the standard Matryoshka-Representation-Learning convention (the model can produce embeddings at any dimension d where `min ≤ d ≤ max`).

Add NEW `pub enum GpuKind { Cuda, TensorRt, DirectMl }` at MODULE ROOT of `models.rs` (NOT a `None` variant — absence is signalled via `Result::Err(NoGpuDetected)`, not `Ok(GpuKind::None)`, so the success path is unambiguous). `#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]` so it's freely cloneable and pattern-matchable.

Add NEW `pub fn detect_gpu_execution_provider() -> Result<GpuKind, Qwen3EmbeddingError>` at MODULE ROOT of `models.rs`. Implementation strategy: probe via `cfg!(feature = "...")` for the per-crate `ort/cuda` / `ort/tensorrt` / `ort/directml` feature flags. The `ort` workspace dep is configured `default-features = false, features = ["std", "download-binaries", "tls-rustls"]` (per Cargo.toml line 194), so NONE of the GPU EP features are compiled in. The function therefore returns `Err(Qwen3EmbeddingError::NoGpuDetected { reason: "no GPU execution provider compiled in (workspace ort: default-features=false; need cuda/tensorrt/directml feature flag to enable GPU inference)".to_owned() })` UNCONDITIONALLY on this workspace. The function is structured with an `if cfg!(feature = "<gpu>") { /* attempt EP probe */ }` ladder so a future workspace `ort` feature change can flip a code path on without an API surface change. The probe attempt for each feature-gated path uses `ort::execution_providers::CUDAExecutionProvider::default().is_available()` (per ort 2.0.0-rc.12's `ExecutionProvider::is_available()` trait method, line 118 of `ort-2.0.0-rc.12/src/ep/mod.rs`); on `Ok(true)` the function returns `Ok(GpuKind::Cuda)`. The return shape (`Result<GpuKind, Qwen3EmbeddingError>`) means the function NEVER panics — operator-readable error always. Tracing: `#[tracing::instrument(name = "ucil.embeddings.qwen3.detect_gpu", level = "debug")]`.

Add NEW `pub enum Qwen3EmbeddingError` at MODULE ROOT of `models.rs` with `#[non_exhaustive]`, `#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]`, and ≥6 variants for proper coverage per WO-0060 lessons line 643 (`for any NEW source module > 250 LOC with thiserror enum ≥5 variants, prescribe variant-coverage map`): (a) `NoGpuDetected { reason: String }` — fires when no GPU EP is available. `#[error("no GPU execution provider available: {reason}")]`. (b) `DimensionOutOfRange { value: usize, min: usize, max: usize }` — fires when Matryoshka d is outside [32, 7168]. `#[error("Matryoshka dimension {value} out of range [{min}, {max}]")]`. (c) `MissingModelFile { path: PathBuf }` — fires when the model.onnx file is absent (defensive — the current build never reaches this path because `detect_gpu_execution_provider` returns `NoGpuDetected` first, but the variant is wired in for the future GPU-enabled load path). `#[error("required Qwen3 model file missing at {path:?}")]`. (d) `Onnx { #[from] source: ort::Error }` — wraps ort runtime errors when GPU is enabled (defensive — wired in for the future GPU-enabled path). `#[error("ort session error: {source}")]`. (e) `Tokenizer { message: String }` — wraps tokenizers crate errors (defensive). `#[error("tokenizer error: {message}")]`. (f) `Io { #[from] source: std::io::Error }` — wraps filesystem ops. `#[error("io error: {source}")]`.

Add the FROZEN acceptance test `pub fn test_qwen3_config_gate()` at MODULE ROOT of `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` (DEC-0007 — NOT inside `mod tests {}` or any other sub-module; column-0 `pub fn`). The frozen `feature-list.json:P2-W8-F03.acceptance_tests[0].selector` is `-p ucil-embeddings models::test_qwen3_config_gate` — substring match so module-root placement is the safe shape. The test exercises 12 sub-assertions: (SA1) `Qwen3Embedding::load(temp_dir.path(), 1024)` returns `Err(Qwen3EmbeddingError::NoGpuDetected { .. })` on this build (workspace ort has no cuda/tensorrt/directml features compiled). Assert via a `match` arm pinning the variant explicitly, with an operator-readable panic message on any other shape. (SA2) `validate_matryoshka_dimension(1024)` returns `Ok(1024)` (mid-range valid; the master-plan default for Qwen3 per §17.6 line 2029 comment `1024 for Qwen3`). (SA3) `validate_matryoshka_dimension(32)` returns `Ok(32)` (lower-bound inclusive). (SA4) `validate_matryoshka_dimension(7168)` returns `Ok(7168)` (upper-bound inclusive). (SA5) `validate_matryoshka_dimension(31)` returns `Err(DimensionOutOfRange { value: 31, .. })` (just below min). (SA6) `validate_matryoshka_dimension(7169)` returns `Err(DimensionOutOfRange { value: 7169, .. })` (just above max). (SA7) `EmbeddingBackend::from_config_str("qwen3-embedding")` returns `Ok(EmbeddingBackend::Qwen3)`. (SA8) `EmbeddingBackend::from_config_str("coderankembed")` returns `Ok(EmbeddingBackend::CodeRankEmbed)`. (SA9) `EmbeddingBackend::from_config_str("invalid-model-name")` returns `Err(ConfigError::UnknownEmbeddingModel { name })` with the name field equal to `"invalid-model-name"`. (SA10) `VectorStoreConfig::from_toml_str("")` returns `Ok(VectorStoreConfig::default())` and the default's fields exactly match the master-plan-frozen defaults (backend="lancedb", embedding_model="coderankembed", embedding_dimensions=768, chunk_max_tokens=512, reindex_on_startup=false). (SA11) `VectorStoreConfig::from_toml_str("[vector_store]
embedding_model = "qwen3-embedding"
embedding_dimensions = 1024
")` returns `Ok` and the resulting struct's fields reflect the override (embedding_model == "qwen3-embedding", embedding_dimensions == 1024) while other fields keep the defaults. (SA12) `detect_gpu_execution_provider()` returns `Err(NoGpuDetected { .. })` on this build. Each sub-assertion uses operator-readable assertion messages with literal observed-value capture per WO-0058 lessons line 547 (`"<predicate description>; got {:?}"` shape). Use `tempfile::TempDir` for the temp model_dir in SA1.

Add `#[cfg(test)] mod qwen3_tests {}` block at FILE END of `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` (per WO-0059 lessons line 601 — DEC-0007 frozen-test stays at module root, additional unit tests live at `models::tests::*` or `models::qwen3_tests::*` without selector collision). The block contains 5-7 negative-path unit tests for variant coverage per WO-0060 lessons line 643: (a) `test_dimension_out_of_range_value_zero` — `validate_matryoshka_dimension(0)` returns `Err(DimensionOutOfRange { value: 0, min: 32, max: 7168 })`. (b) `test_dimension_out_of_range_max_value` — `validate_matryoshka_dimension(usize::MAX)` returns `Err(DimensionOutOfRange { value: usize::MAX, .. })`. (c) `test_qwen3_error_display_renders_no_gpu` — confirms `format!("{}", Qwen3EmbeddingError::NoGpuDetected { reason: "test".into() })` contains the canonical text "no GPU execution provider". (d) `test_qwen3_error_display_renders_dimension_out_of_range` — confirms Display contains the canonical text "Matryoshka dimension" and "out of range". (e) `test_qwen3_error_display_renders_missing_model_file` — confirms Display contains "model file missing". (f) `test_gpu_detection_returns_no_gpu_on_default_workspace` — confirms `detect_gpu_execution_provider()` returns `Err(NoGpuDetected)` under the default workspace `ort` features (this is REDUNDANT with SA12 but the duplication is intentional — verifier may stash one site to confirm the other still fires; carry from WO-0042 lessons line 71 pre-baked-mutation pattern). (g) `test_qwen3_load_returns_dim_out_of_range_before_gpu_check` — confirms `Qwen3Embedding::load(temp.path(), 16)` returns `Err(DimensionOutOfRange)`, NOT `Err(NoGpuDetected)`, establishing the load-method's check ordering: dimension validation FIRST, then GPU probe. The check ordering is load-bearing — see scope_in[4] step (i) and (ii).

Add `#[cfg(test)] mod config_tests {}` block at FILE END of `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/config.rs` containing 5-7 negative-path unit tests for `ConfigError` variant coverage: (a) `test_from_toml_str_returns_default_for_empty_input` — `VectorStoreConfig::from_toml_str("")` returns `Ok(VectorStoreConfig::default())`. (b) `test_from_toml_str_parses_explicit_qwen3` — TOML with `[vector_store]
embedding_model = "qwen3-embedding"
embedding_dimensions = 1024
` parses to a struct with the override. (c) `test_from_toml_str_returns_toml_error_for_malformed_input` — input `"[vector_store
"` (unterminated header) returns `Err(ConfigError::Toml { source: _ })`. (d) `test_from_config_str_returns_unknown_for_invalid_model` — `EmbeddingBackend::from_config_str("foo")` returns `Err(ConfigError::UnknownEmbeddingModel { name: "foo" })`. (e) `test_config_error_display_renders_canonical_text` — Display checks for each variant's `#[error(...)]` text. (f) `test_default_vector_store_config_matches_master_plan_spec` — confirms `VectorStoreConfig::default()` field-by-field match against the master-plan-frozen defaults (backend="lancedb", embedding_model="coderankembed", embedding_dimensions=768, chunk_max_tokens=512, reindex_on_startup=false). (g) `test_embedding_backend_from_config_str_round_trip` — both `"qwen3-embedding"` and `"coderankembed"` round-trip to the correct enum variant.

Create NEW file `scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh` (~50-80 LOC) with `set -euo pipefail` at top. The script: (1) `cd` to repo root via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`. (2) Frozen-selector module-root grep: `grep -nE '^(pub )?fn test_qwen3_config_gate' crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs | head -1` returns a column-0 line (DEC-0007 module-root placement). Fail with operator-readable stderr otherwise. (3) Run `cargo test -p ucil-embeddings models::test_qwen3_config_gate -- --nocapture` and assert the captured output contains EITHER `test result: ok. 1 passed` OR `1 tests run` (both `cargo test` and `cargo nextest` shapes per WO-0042 lessons line 75). (4) Negative-path coverage spot-check: run `cargo test -p ucil-embeddings models::qwen3_tests config::config_tests -- --nocapture` and assert `0 failed` in the captured output. (5) Print `[OK] P2-W8-F03 qwen3 config gate verified` on success; exit 0. Print operator-readable failure on stderr otherwise; exit 1.
Make `scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh` executable (`chmod +x scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh`).

Pre-bake mutation #1 (`validate_matryoshka_dimension` body neutered): replace the body's `if MIN_MATRYOSHKA_DIM <= d && d <= MAX_MATRYOSHKA_DIM { Ok(d) } else { Err(...) }` with a single `Ok(d)` (skip the range check entirely). Add `#[allow(unused_imports)]` to the function for the mutation step if needed. Expected runtime failure on `cargo test -p ucil-embeddings models::test_qwen3_config_gate`: SA5 fails because `validate_matryoshka_dimension(31)` now returns `Ok(31)` instead of the expected `Err(DimensionOutOfRange)` — the assertion `assert!(matches!(result, Err(DimensionOutOfRange { value: 31, .. })))` panics with operator-readable message. Restore: `git checkout -- crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs`. Rerun: green.

Pre-bake mutation #2 (`detect_gpu_execution_provider` body neutered): replace the body to `Ok(GpuKind::Cuda)` (always-claim-GPU). Expected runtime failure on `cargo test -p ucil-embeddings models::test_qwen3_config_gate`: SA1 fails because `Qwen3Embedding::load(...)` now returns `Ok(Qwen3Embedding{...})` instead of `Err(NoGpuDetected)` — the `match` arm pinning `Err(NoGpuDetected { .. })` is unmatched; SA12 ALSO fails for the same reason. Restore: `git checkout -- crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs`. Rerun: green. (Defence in depth — two SAs corner the same mutation.)

Pre-bake mutation #3 (`EmbeddingBackend::from_config_str` body neutered): replace the body to always return `Ok(EmbeddingBackend::CodeRankEmbed)` (regardless of input). Expected runtime failure on `cargo test -p ucil-embeddings models::test_qwen3_config_gate`: SA7 fails because `from_config_str("qwen3-embedding")` now returns `Ok(CodeRankEmbed)` instead of `Ok(Qwen3)` — the assertion `assert_eq!(result, Ok(EmbeddingBackend::Qwen3))` panics; SA9 ALSO fails because `from_config_str("invalid-model-name")` now returns `Ok(CodeRankEmbed)` instead of `Err(UnknownEmbeddingModel)`. Restore: `git checkout -- crates/ucil-embeddings/src/config.rs`. Rerun: green.

Commit cadence (~50 LOC soft target per root CLAUDE.md): EXPECTED 6 commits — (1) `build(embeddings): add toml + serde deps for vector_store config` (Cargo.toml dev-dep + Cargo.lock auto-sync; the Cargo.lock churn should be near-zero since toml/serde are already in the workspace dep graph), (2) `feat(embeddings): add VectorStoreConfig + EmbeddingBackend (P2-W8-F03)` (NEW config.rs with VectorStoreConfig + EmbeddingBackend + ConfigError types + parser; ~120 LOC; cite DEC-0005 module-coherence + WO-0048/56/58/59/60 precedent stack inline if >100 LOC), (3) `test(embeddings): cover ConfigError negative paths` (NEW config_tests block at file end of config.rs; ~80 LOC), (4) `feat(embeddings): add Qwen3Embedding + GPU detection (P2-W8-F03)` (additions to models.rs: Qwen3Embedding + Qwen3EmbeddingError + validate_matryoshka_dimension + detect_gpu_execution_provider + GpuKind + frozen test test_qwen3_config_gate; ~250-350 LOC; cite the precedent stack inline), (5) `test(embeddings): cover Qwen3EmbeddingError variants` (NEW qwen3_tests block at file end of models.rs; ~100 LOC), (6) `feat(scripts): add verify/P2-W8-F03.sh + lib.rs re-exports` (lib.rs re-exports + scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh + chmod +x + ready-for-review marker). Single commit > 200 LOC for commits (4) is acceptable per the cumulative bundling-precedent (WO-0048 297-LOC, WO-0056 542-LOC, WO-0058 305-LOC, WO-0059 425-LOC, WO-0060 503-LOC, WO-0061 246-LOC).

Commit-subject pre-flight (per WO-0059 lessons line 607 + WO-0060 lessons line 645): every commit subject ≤70 chars. Validated examples: `build(embeddings): add toml + serde deps for vector_store config` (62), `feat(embeddings): add VectorStoreConfig + EmbeddingBackend (F03)` (60), `test(embeddings): cover ConfigError negative paths` (49), `feat(embeddings): add Qwen3Embedding + GPU detection (P2-W8-F03)` (62), `test(embeddings): cover Qwen3EmbeddingError variants` (50), `feat(scripts): add verify/P2-W8-F03.sh + lib.rs re-exports` (53). All ≤70 chars. Pre-flight `git log --format='%s' main..HEAD` to confirm.

Pre-flight ban-words grep (per WO-0061 lessons line 686): `rg -inE 'mock|fake|stub|fixture' crates/ucil-embeddings/src/config.rs crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs scripts/verify/P2-W8-F03.sh` returns ZERO hits in the NEW or modified portions (case-insensitive). The existing `models.rs` rustdoc may already contain compliant text; the AC scope is the NEW additions only. Plain English alternatives: `synthetic` → `in-test`, `dummy` → `minimal`, `mock-shape` → `stand-in shape` if needed. Pre-commit grep before each `git commit`.

Upstream-API research checklist (per WO-0060 lessons line 644): for the `ort` crate dep — (a) does `ort 2.0.0-rc.12` expose `ort::execution_providers::CUDAExecutionProvider`? (verify via `find ~/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-*/ort-2.0.0-rc.12/src/ep/cuda.rs` AT EXECUTOR TIME — if the path no longer exists or the API has shifted, document inline + RFR per WO-0058 lessons line 543). (b) Is `CUDAExecutionProvider` only available behind the `cuda` feature flag? (yes — without that feature, the type does not exist at compile time; the implementation MUST `cfg!(feature = "...")` the EP probe so the workspace builds with `default-features = false`). (c) The `toml::from_str` API takes `&str` and returns `Result<T, toml::de::Error>` — verify by skimming `~/.cargo/registry/src/.../toml-0.8.*/src/de.rs` if surface uncertainty arises. (d) `serde::Deserialize` derive macro requires the `derive` feature on `serde` — workspace pins `serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }` (Cargo.toml line 34) so the per-crate `serde.workspace = true` is sufficient. (e) `tempfile::TempDir` is already used by `ucil-embeddings` (per `crates/ucil-embeddings/Cargo.toml [dev-dependencies] tempfile.workspace = true`), so the SA1 temp_dir setup needs no new dep.

AC27 verifies.
